title: Domain Search Accelerator — UFC RAG platform
description: Hybrid search RAG stack on AWS with FastAPI, FAISS, Redis, and LangChain for UFC stats at scale.

title: Triton NeuroTech Research Group
description: Latent diffusion and PyTorch pipelines for brain imaging with CLIP embeddings and mixed-precision training.

title: BlogNorte — social blogging platform
description: MERN stack app with auth, CI/CD, and WebSockets for comments and notifications.

title: Mock — Chain Sense (crypto portfolio tracker)
description: Mock project: a toy dashboard that pretends to aggregate wallet balances and token prices from fake RPC responses. Not production code—just UI and placeholder JSON for experimenting with charts.

title: Mock — Ledger Lint CLI
description: Mock project: a pretend command-line tool that scans a folder of made-up transaction CSVs and prints silly warnings like “gas vibes too high.” Built to practice argparse and terminal output formatting.

title: Mock — MemeCoin Price Pinger
description: Mock project: polls random number generators shaped like price ticks, logs them to stdout, and occasionally prints “moon” when the fake RSI crosses 70. No real exchange integration.

title: Mock — On-chain Alert Bot
description: Mock project: listens to a hardcoded list of fake contract addresses and sends console alerts when a counter increments. Useful only as a sandbox for async loops and backoff timers.

title: Mock — Wallet Dashboard UI
description: Mock project: static HTML/CSS layout for a crypto-style wallet overview with donut charts fed by hand-written JSON. Purely visual; numbers are not real.

title: Mock — Solidity Study Notes Site
description: Mock project: a tiny static site that lists made-up Solidity snippets and quiz cards. Content is placeholder text so I could practice layout and navigation without deploying real contracts.

title: Mock — NFT Floor Tracker (demo data)
description: Mock project: reads a local JSON file of imaginary collection floors and renders a sortable table. No OpenSea keys, no chain calls—just D3-style number formatting practice.

title: Mock — Gas Fee Heatmap (sample CSV)
description: Mock project: ingests a synthetic CSV of hourly gas numbers and paints a heatmap in the browser. The CSV is generated by a one-off script with random noise.

title: Mock — Proof-of-Attendance Badge SVG
description: Mock project: procedurally tweaks SVG colors based on a fake attendee id. Good for learning SVG attributes; not tied to any real event or blockchain.
